title: UK REACH authorisation for SEA Consortium (surface treatment), 19 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised use  The use of chromium trioxide for the surface treatment of engineering components, mainly for the aerospace and defence sector, with the purpose of creating a coating to meet specific and critical performance characteristics.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number  Surface Engineering Association (SEA) Consortium (Surface Treatment):   Hard Anodising Surface Treatments Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/00) Nu-Pro Ltd / Magnaghi UK Limited (UKREACH/25/06/01) Walton Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/02) Russell Laboratories Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/03) East Lancashire Platers Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/04) Global Metal Finishing Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/05) Twickenham Plating Ltd (UKREACH/25/06/06)   Date of decision  19 February 2025  "
